## Goal


## Scope

- Dataset or manifest changes:
- Sampler or batch-shape changes:
- Checkpoint/resume changes:
- Logging or metrics changes:

## Safety Checks

- [ ] Does not interrupt currently running jobs
- [ ] Has a rollback path for launch scripts or TUI defaults
- [ ] Documents data roots, checkpoint paths, and environment variables
- [ ] Includes lightweight tests or a reason tests are not feasible
